channel.title: Tom Nagengast
channel.description: Essays and ideas from Tom Nagengast

item.title: QRPTSPI & the art of routing
item.description: Standalone reference for QRPTSPI model selection.

item.title: OpenTelemetry & the shape of signals
item.description: A practitioner's field manual for logs, traces, and metrics — what each is for, what each costs, and how OTel makes them talk.
